Introduction

1.1 Purpose of this document

This document speciﬁes the format of the OMI UVB Level 3 product. The archive format is
based on HDF-EOS5 format, which is an extension to standard HDF5 ﬁle format.

1.2 Deﬁnitions, acronyms and abbreviations

Earth Observing System
Finnish Meteorological Institute
Hierarchical Data Format

EOS
FMI
HDF
HDF-EOS HDF - Earth Observation System, extension to HDF
OMI
OMTO3
OMUVB
OMUVBd
OMUVBG Level 2G surface UV irradiance product
TOMS

Ozone Monitoring Instrument
Level 2 total ozone product based on the TOMS algorithm
Level 2 surface UV irradiance product
Level 3 surface UV irradiance product

Total Ozone Mapping Spectrometer

4

 2 OMI Level 3 Surface UV Irradiance Product Format

2.1 Overview of the product

The OMI level 3 Surface UV Irradiance Product contains gridded and quality screened surface
UV irradiance and dose quantities averaged over calendar day. Additionally it includes metadata
for data search.

2.2 Product identiﬁer

The identiﬁer of the OMI Level 3 surface UV irradiance product is OMUVBd.

2.3 Data ﬁle size

The format of the product ﬁle is HDF5. The size of the ﬁle is usually about 4 Mbytes.

2.4 File name convention

OMUVBd ﬁlenames are constructed from sections delimited by underscore. This basis is fol-
lowed by a suﬃx delimited by a period. Thus, the product ﬁle names are of the form:

<Instrument ID> <Data Type> <Product date> <Version>.<Suﬃx>

Table 1: Description of the ﬁle name sections

Format

Section
Instrument ID “OMI-Aura”
Data Type
Product date
Version
Suﬃx

“L3-OMUVBd”
<yyyy>m<mmdd>
v<nnn>-<yyyy>m<mmdd>t<hhmmss> Collection number and processing time
“he5”

Product ﬁle suﬃx

Description
ID for the instrument and spacecraft
Product type
Product date

2.5 File structure

The data ﬁles follow the HDF-EOS grid format. Data ﬁeld groups are stored within /HD-
FEOS/GRIDS/OMI Surface UV Radiation/ group. The metadata are stored as HDF-EOS ﬁle
level attributes in the /HDFEOS/ADDITIONAL/FILE ATTRIBUTES group. The product
contains only one grid structure.

2.6 Grid structure

The OMUVBd product grid structure consists of Data Field groups within the OMI UVB
PRODUCT group. Table 2 shows the dimensions of the data ﬁeld structures. Data level
attributes are shown in table 3 and ﬁll values for missing data are shown in table 4. Grid
structure metadata are stored in /HDFEOS INFORMATION/StructMetadata.

Table 2: Dimensions of the grid structure

Size Description

Name
XDim 360 X-dimension, longitudes [-180:180] from left to right
YDim 180 Y-dimension, latitudes [-90:90] from bottom to top
